scope: Local development runtime activation. No Worker or Pod was created and no provider credential was read.

repairs.root_cause: Hermes postinstall requires Python 3.11 but runner-hermes used the base image.
repairs.verification: docker/agent-runtime/contract_test.sh and docker build plus hermes --version passed.

repairs.root_cause: MiniMax Compose Runner was absent from the idempotent dev seed Runner list.
repairs.verification: Seed replay plus mTLS stream, initialization, agent probe, tunnel connection, and Backend runner attestation passed.

repairs.root_cause: The local catalog revision concatenated runtime slugs and reached 182 characters, exceeding the WorkerTemplate 128-character revision contract.
repairs.fix: The generator now derives a fixed SHA-256 revision from sorted image identity and digest data.
repairs.verification: Node catalog tests, Backend WorkerTemplate validation tests, catalog shape assertions, and Backend health checks passed.

browser_observation.before_revision_fix: OpenCode, Hermes, MiniMax CLI, OpenClaw, and Grok Build were visible and selectable after Backend catalog reload. Loopal remained disabled because no verified runtime image exists.
browser_observation.after_revision_fix: Browser automation was interrupted by the environment security policy before rechecking the new revision. This recheck remains required.

support_conclusion: No Worker support status changed. A runtime image, connected Runner, or selectable type does not prove credential injection, Provider API access, Pod lifecycle, terminal access, or end-user success.
